hero.description: ETAL designs and manufactures IEC-certified electrical components in Egypt, powering critical infrastructure for panel builders and global utilities.

audience.title: Built for the Whole Chain
audience.subtitle: From design desk to installation, ETAL supports every role in the electrical project lifecycle.

consultant.title: Consultant
consultant.desc: Detailed datasheets, CAD drawings and standards documentation to support specification and project design.

panel_builder.title: Panel Builder
panel_builder.desc: Compact, certified components with full dimensional data and mounting accessories for LV assemblies.

contractor.title: Contractor
contractor.desc: IEC-certified protection gear built for straightforward installation with full traceability and after-sales support.

sectors.title: Built for demanding applications.
sectors.subtitle: ETAL components are specified across power distribution, industrial, renewable and critical infrastructure projects.

power_distribution.name: Power Distribution
power_distribution.desc: Protection for LV/MV distribution networks and switchgear panels.

industrial.name: Industrial
industrial.desc: Heavy-duty protection for manufacturing and process automation.

renewable_energy.name: Renewable Energy
renewable_energy.desc: Solutions for solar inverters, wind and BESS systems.

rail_transport.name: Rail & Transport
rail_transport.desc: Certified protection for rail and transit infrastructure.

data_centres.name: Data Centres
data_centres.desc: High-reliability protection for critical IT infrastructure.

oil_gas.name: Oil & Gas
oil_gas.desc: Robust protection for hazardous energy environments.

featured.title: The complete LV loop.
featured.subtitle: Four concise families covering measurement, protection and switching.

ct.name: Current Transformers
ct.desc: Precision-wound resin CTs for LV panel metering and protection.

hrc.name: HRC Fuse Links
hrc.desc: High rupturing capacity fuse links for fast fault clearance.

fsd.name: Fuse Switch Disconnectors
fsd.desc: Combined fuse and switch for safe LV circuit isolation.

bs.name: Busbar Supports
bs.desc: Insulated clamps and supports for LV busbar systems.

cta.description: Access datasheets, IEC certificates, and CAD drawings for our complete electrical range. Everything you need for your technical submittals, ready for instant download.
cta.no_registration: No registration required for public documentation

footer.tagline: International manufacturer of electrical protection and measurement components. Precision-engineered in Fayoum, Egypt since 2007.

contact.description: Our engineering and support teams are standing by to assist with sales inquiries, technical specifications, or global export logistics.
contact.form_notice: All technical requests are processed via secure channel.

form.subject: Inquiry Subject
form.success_body: Your technical inquiry has been logged. An ETAL engineer will review your specifications and respond shortly.
form.error_body: Failed to dispatch request. Please verify credentials or try again.

products_page.description: Explore our core component families, engineered to meet stringent international standards and rigorous industrial environments.
